dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, things have gotten worse since you helped us {quest_action}. I had hoped the worst was behind us.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} discovered that {quest_threat} are regrouping near {quest_focus}. The {enemy_type} have been spotted {location_hint}, and {quest_stakes} are still at risk.
dialogueChunks.outro: We cannot let them undo everything you have done for us. Please, help us again.

playerResponses.text: I will put an end to this.
Again? This had better be the last time.
You need to learn to handle this yourselves.

dialogueChunks.intro: I wish I had better news, {player_name}. Your efforts to {quest_action} bought us time, but not enough.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Something is driving {quest_threat} to act with new desperation. {quest_ally} thinks there may be a source: a nest or camp {location_hint}. If we do not deal with it, {quest_stakes} will suffer all over again.
dialogueChunks.outro: Find whatever is behind this and put a stop to it.

playerResponses.text: I will find the source and end it.
This is getting tiresome, but fine.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I know you have already done so much. But {quest_threat} struck again last night, harder than before.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They came straight for {quest_focus}. {quest_stakes} barely escaped. {quest_ally} says the {enemy_type} are being organized by something smarter: there are tracks leading {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we do not act now, everything we have rebuilt will be lost.

playerResponses.text: Show me the tracks. I will follow them.
You owe me double for this one.
